titleStmt.title: SII 38.556: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 556. (A.R. No. 556 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the west wall, Chakravartti-Tirumagaṉ shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkravartigaḷ Vīrarājēndrachōḻa Year 34, Ṛishabha, śu. di. 3, Wednesday, Puṇarpūśam = 25th May 1278 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. It seems to record the assignment of taxes such as poṉvari, nāṭṭuvari, kudimagaṇmai, kāṇikkaipēruk-kāśu and other taxes collected from the temple environs (tirumaḍaiviḷāgam) by (the official) Pañchanidivāṇaṉ Nallanāyaṉ alias Chōḻagaṅgadēvaṉ for conducting offerings and worship to the god Nakkanāyaṉār of Pammal on the auspicious occasion (in the month) of Tiruvaikāśi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarājendracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 4vatu ṛṣabha nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇaṟpū
cattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup puliyūrkoṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu curattūrnāṭṭu pammalil Uṭaiyār pamlalaRead pammal or pammalilnakka ṉāyaṉāṟku pañca
nitivāṇaṉ nallanāyaṉāṉa coḻakaṅkatevaneṉ Uṭaiyār pammaṉakka nāyaṉāṟku tiruvaiykāci tirunāḷaikku nām I vāka Iṉṉāyaṉār tirumaṭai
viḷākattu niyāyattār perilk kaṭaimai poṉvari nāṭṭuvari kuṭimakaṇmai kāṇikkai peṟṟukkācu paṭṭikuṟṟam
kāṇikkai peṟṟukkācu nāṭṭuvari
paṭuvari kuṭimakaṉmaiRead makaṇmai
rā peṟkaṭamai poṉvari kuṭimakaṉmaiRead makaṇmai
Digital edition of SII 38.556 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
